title: Open Cosmos Menut L1C COGs
description: Menut images, processed to L1C, at full resolution, with ancillary data in cloud optimised geotiff format.

B.description: Cloud optimised raster data containing blue band spectral data
B.title: Band 0 (Blue)

G.description: Cloud optimised raster data containing green band spectral data
G.title: Band 1 (Green)

NIR.description: Cloud optimised raster data containing infra-red band spectral data
NIR.title: Band 6 (NIR)

PAN.description: Cloud optimised raster data containing infra-red band spectral data (Platero only)
PAN.title: Band 7 (PAN)

R.description: Cloud optimised raster data containing red band spectral data
R.title: Band 2 (Red)

RE1.description: Cloud optimised raster data containing infra-red band spectral data
RE1.title: Band 3 (RedEdge 1)

RE2.description: Cloud optimised raster data containing infra-red band spectral data
RE2.title: Band 4 (RedEdge 2)

RE3.description: Cloud optimised raster data containing infra-red band spectral data
RE3.title: Band 5 (RedEdge 3)

TCI.description: Cloud optimised raster data containing true colour RGB composite image
TCI.title: True Colour Image

ancillary.description: Contains both intrinsic (sensor size, pixel size, focal length, principal point, aperture length, reference frame) and extrinsics (position, velocity, angular rates, and attitude) parameters
ancillary.title: Photogrammetric metadata

thumbnail.description: A low resolution true colour composite image for quick visualisation of imagery data, typically used as a preview in the browser
thumbnail.title: Thumbnail (TCI)
